title: avenula hookeri subsp. schelliana
intro: Avenula hookeri subsp. schelliana, also known as Schell's oatgrass, is a subspecies of grass within the Avenula genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Avenula hookeri subsp. schelliana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Avenula hookeri subsp. schelliana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
